attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NSMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY        		 AS	MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
COALESCE((SOMN.SPLIT_PERCENT*100),0)         		END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,
NP.PARTY_KEY                     AS FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
NPSV.PARTY_KEY    AS SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_UPDATE_USER,	
'I'			ACTION_CODE,
'I'				DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL SOMN
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX NSMT  
ON SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSMT.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT
AND SOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE=NSMT.TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD
AND TRIM(NSMT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'MANUAL'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP
ON SOMN.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NP.SS_CODE='CR'
AND NP.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPSV
ON SOMN.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
WHERE SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
EOMN.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,EOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID
,EOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE
,EOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,EOMN.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,EOMN.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,EOMN.SAV_ID
,EOMN.SPLIT_PERCENT
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,EOMN.START_DATE
,EOMN.STATUS_CODE
,EOMN.CREATION_DATE
,EOMN.USER_NAME
,EOMN.VALIDATION_DATE
,EOMN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,EOMN.BATCH_ID
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL EOMN
WHERE EOMN.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND EOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT' AND NOT EXISTS
(  SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL SOMN
WHERE SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID=EOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT')

SELECT
SOMN.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID
,SOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE
,SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,SOMN.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,SOMN.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,SOMN.SAV_ID
,SOMN.SPLIT_PERCENT
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,SOMN.START_DATE
,SOMN.STATUS_CODE
,SOMN.CREATION_DATE
,SOMN.USER_NAME
,SOMN.VALIDATION_DATE
,SOMN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,SOMN.BATCH_ID,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL SOMN
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX NSMT  
ON SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSMT.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID_INT
AND SOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE=NSMT.TRANSACTION_ORIGINATION_CD
AND TRIM(NSMT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'MANUAL'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP
ON SOMN.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NP.SS_CODE='CR'
AND NP.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPSV
ON SOMN.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
WHERE SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT'
AND (NSMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY IS NULL
OR NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT IS NULL
OR NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT IS NULL)
